name: msgraph-groups-list-members

outputs.description: The telephone numbers for the user. MSGraphGroups.Members.GivenName The given name (first name) of the user.
outputs.name: MSGraphGroups.Members.BussinessPhones

outputs.description: The primary mobile telephone number for the user. MSGraphGroups.Members.DisplayName The name displayed in the address book for the user.
outputs.name: MSGraphGroups.Members.MobilePhone

outputs.description: MSGraphGroups.Members.UserPrincipalName The user principal name (UPN) of the user. The UPN is an Internet-style login name for the user based on the Internet standard RFC 822.
outputs.name: Usually the combination of the user's first name, middle initial and last name.

outputs.description: The general format is alias@domain, where the domain must be present in the tenant’s collection of verified domains. MSGraphGroups.Members.OfficeLocation The office location in the user's place of business.
outputs.name: By convention, this should map to the user's email name.

outputs.description: The SMTP address for the user. For example, "jeff@contoso.onmicrosoft.com". MSGraphGroups.Members.PreferredLanguage The preferred language for the user. Should follow ISO 639-1 Code. For example, "en-US".
outputs.name: MSGraphGroups.Members.Mail

outputs.description: The user's surname (family name or last name). MSGraphGroups.Members.JobTitle The user’s job title.
outputs.name: MSGraphGroups.Members.Surname

outputs.description: The unique identifier for the user.
outputs.name: MSGraphGroups.Members.ID
